title: Z-ero
overview: Johnny Barnes, an otherwise average man trying to survive in a world being taken over by zombies, is infected by an alpha-female zombie. To his surprise, he discovers that he not only retains his cognitive abilities but has inherited special abilities too. He finds himself now on a mission to help rid the world of the cold-bodies and discover his full potential.
